methods.description: This method involves selecting and analyzing plants based on GFP fluorescence to identify those most likely to be homozygous for specific genetic inserts. It includes germination, selection under UV light, fluorescence measurement using a spectrofluorometer, and analysis with specialized software.

steps.description: Brightly fluorescent T0 plants, as determined by visual observation for GFP, were selected for analysis and further breeding.
steps.searchable_summary: select T0 plants based on GFP fluorescence for further analysis

steps.description: T1 seeds were germinated and handheld UV light was used to select the brightest GFP-expressing seedlings.
steps.searchable_summary: germinate T1 seeds and select seedlings with brightest GFP expression using UV light

steps.description: GFP fluorescence was measured by a spectrofluorometer and analyzed with its software to quantify average fluorescence from each T1 line.
steps.searchable_summary: measure and analyze GFP fluorescence using spectrofluorometer and software

steps.description: Individual plants were selected that had the highest measured fluorescence, and thus, were most likely to be homozygous for the TD-GFP-K or TD-GFP-H inserts.
steps.searchable_summary: select plants with highest fluorescence for homozygosity likelihood

methods.description: This method involves observing pollen from T1 plants under a microscope to assess fluorescence using a specific filter set. The process includes preparing pollen suspensions, transferring them to slides, and capturing images with a digital camera.

steps.description: When T1 plants flowered, pollen was taken from each plant, suspended in 200 μl of water.
steps.searchable_summary: suspend pollen from T1 plants in water

steps.description: 15 μl of the suspension transferred to a microscope slide and observed under an epifluorescent microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer pollen suspension to slide and observe under microscope

steps.description: A Texas Red®/Cy3.5 (TxRed) filter set was used to view fluorescent pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: use TxRed filter set to view fluorescent pollen

steps.description: The field of view was captured by a digital camera and imaging system.
steps.searchable_summary: capture field of view with digital camera and imaging system
